{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032319394187F72AB35AF877FE7724"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614335677984408345","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不好说，男主有点弱智，不过其他人也都有降智且主角有运气挂恰好弥补了这一点，第一个物资箱没有提升品质而是先开，开完了再提升开出来物品的品质，有着好运加成的情况下和女主各开各的，开物资箱一笔带过，用的时候才写有多少
女主傲娇怪，不过一会伪人一会娇，不做过多描述，有个毒点是有人借着交易的名头加女主开黄腔，原文里就也没细致描写而是一句话带过（苏晚晴这时也忙完了生意，刚刚一堆色批假意交易加她好友对她开黄腔使她烦躁不已，但是闻到精良级的豹肉后，心情不知道为何顿时好了），不过反正给我恶心到了，给主角当无能的丈夫整呢"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772855240,"group_id":"7598895491027323966","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我是土狗，我爱看爽文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2hxZEA4pqFwWEOgvbrMkvpFzN6MvBeZ8GVD3IgghAiL","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/560e2d5b33604109bf9bfc3bc4ea2f42~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793197&x-signature=Mgcj4n2TnW9CqmgRecCPxEmuJl0%3D","user_id":"2232480255974572","user_name":"伤口上撒闫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2232480255974572","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7598895491027323966","book_info":{"abstract":"【全民求生】【爽文】【杀伐果断】全民求生！适者生存，弱肉强食。
